text:
EXPLANATION: The paper "Robust watermarking for diffusion models: A unified multi-dimensional recipe" was found on OpenReview as a submission for ICLR 2025. While the search results show the paper exists and the title is correct, it is an anonymous submission, meaning the cited list of authors is not associated with this specific document on its official review page; it appears the authors were hallucinated or incorrectly attributed.

LINK: https://openreview.net/forum?id=O13fIFEB81
FOUND_TITLE: Robust Watermarking for Diffusion Models: A Unified Multi-Dimensional Recipe
FOUND_AUTHORS: NONE
FOUND_YEAR: 2025
VERDICT: LIKELY
